mapper.select: SELECT create_time AS name, COUNT(create_time) AS value FROM (SELECT to_char(create_time,'YYYY-mm-dd') AS create_time FROM t_question WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}) a GROUP BY create_time

SELECT create_time AS name, COUNT(create_time) AS value FROM (SELECT to_char(create_time,'YYYY-mm-dd') AS create_time FROM t_exam_paper WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}) a GROUP BY create_time

SELECT create_time AS name, COUNT(create_time) AS value FROM (SELECT to_char(create_time,'YYYY-mm-dd') AS create_time FROM t_exam_paper_answer WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}) a GROUP BY create_time
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_exam_paper_answer WHERE create_user = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_exam_paper_answer WHERE create_user = #{userId} AND status = 2
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(user_score), 0) FROM t_exam_paper_answer WHERE create_user = #{userId}
